title: Template Syntax
content:
### Mustache Syntax Vue uses double curly braces for text interpolation: ```vue ``` ### v-text and v-html - `v-text` sets `textContent` (equivalent to `{{ }}`) - `v-html` sets `innerHTML` — use with caution to avoid XSS ```vue ``` ### JavaScript Expressions Templates support single JavaScript expressions: ```vue

{{ message.split('').reverse().join('') }}

Items available

``` Statements and control flow are NOT allowed in templates. ### Filters (Vue 2 — Deprecated in Vue 3) In Vue 2, filters were used to format text: ```vue {{ date | formatDate }} ``` Vue 3 removed filters. Use computed properties or methods instead: ```vue

{{ formattedDate }}

```
